description: UPI Phishing - New beneficiary with late-night UPI transfer
SIM Swap - New device with high-amount IMPS transaction
Account Takeover - Unknown device with location anomaly and NEFT transfer
Mule Account - Frequent small transfers across multiple locations
Money Laundering - High-volume rapid transfers to known accounts
Midnight Transfer - Any transaction between 00:00 and 05:00
High Amount Anomaly - Transaction 5x above user average
Untrusted Device - Transaction from device not in user trusted list
Location Anomaly - Transaction from unusual geographic location
New Beneficiary High Amount - First transfer above 50000 to new payee
